chennai.name: H5N1 (Bird Flu)
chennai.prevention: Avoid live poultry markets, practice good hand hygiene, and cook poultry thoroughly.
chennai.notes: Local reports indicate occasional poultry cases; human transmission is rare but caution is advised.

mumbai.name: Dengue Fever
mumbai.prevention: Use mosquito repellents, eliminate standing water, and wear protective clothing.
mumbai.notes: Increased cases reported in monsoon season.

delhi.name: Respiratory Issues from Pollution
delhi.prevention: Wear masks outdoors, stay indoors during high pollution, and use air purifiers.
delhi.notes: High pollution levels are exacerbating flu and respiratory diseases.
